decks.notes: The deck is focused on playing aggressively using artifact creatures and utilizing artifact synergies. It aims to quickly establish a board presence with cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Pinnacle Emissary, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt. The deck uses cards like Kappa Cannoneer and Weapons Manufacturing to deal damage efficiently and close out the game quickly. It also includes some control elements like Metallic Rebuke and Pithing Needle to protect its creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy through a combination of countermagic, removal spells, and hand disruption. It aims to control the game's pace by denying the opponent's key plays and gradually gaining advantage with card advantage engines like Quantum Riddler and Tamiyo. The deck also includes disruptive creatures like Psychic Frog and Orcish Bowmasters to further hinder the opponent's game plan. By efficiently managing resources and using a mix of reactive and proactive spells, the deck is designed to outlast the opponent and secure victory through attrition.

The main concept of this deck is to generate mana quickly with cards like Springleaf Drum and Eldrazi Temple, while using creatures like Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker to control the board. The combo involves using Blade of the Bloodchief to pump up creatures and then casting Sowing Mycospawn to create an army of Saprolings. Malevolent Rumble can then be used to clear the opponent's board while the player swings in for lethal damage. The deck also has backup win conditions with Emrakul, the Promised End and Walking Ballista.

This deck focuses on using a combination of counter spells to protect powerful combo pieces that can win the game quickly without needing to play any lands. The key strategy involves using cards like Goblin Charbelcher and Whir of Invention to assemble a game-winning sequence while utilizing Hydroelectric Specimen and Tameshi, Reality Architect to disrupt opponents. With a strong emphasis on control and combo pieces, the deck aims to quickly overpower opponents and close out games before they have a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on aggressively blinking creatures to generate value and gain tempo advantages. By utilizing cards like Ephemerate and Starfield Shepherd, the deck can repeatedly exile and return key creatures like Solitude and Guide of Souls to control the board and pressure the opponent. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption while cards like Consign to Memory and Prismatic Ending offer versatile removal options. The deck also includes powerful enchantments like Ocelot Pride and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd to further bolster its aggro strategy. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with efficient creature interactions and disruptive spells.

This Jeskai Aggro deck focuses on efficiently utilizing creatures and spells to apply pressure on the opponent and control the board. Quantum Riddler, Ajani, Nacatl Pariah, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer provide strong early game threats, while White Orchid Phantom, Solitude, and Ocelot Pride offer removal and protection. Guide of Souls and Witch Enchanter provide card advantage and pump spells, while Goblin Bombardment adds reach and can finish off opponents. Ephemerate and Consign to Memory provide additional utility and disruption. The deck aims to close out games quickly while maintaining board control.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and enchantments that provide value and disruption. By utilizing cards like Skyclave Apparition and Solitude for removal, along with powerful creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk and Haliya, Guided by Light, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence while controlling the opponent's options. The inclusion of Ranger-Captain of Eos and Ephemerate allows for additional flexibility and consistency in maintaining pressure on the opponent. The land base is optimized for consistency and mana fixing to ensure smooth gameplay.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying small evasive threats like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, backed up by cheap burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to clear a path to victory. Mishra's Bauble and Slickshot Show-Off provide card advantage and help maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to be efficient and aggressive, utilizing cards like Mutagenic Growth and Violent Urge to push through damage and close out games quickly. Expressive Iteration and Preordain help dig for key pieces while also smoothing out draws.

The Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast and aggressive creature play, utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes removal and control elements with cards like Thraben Charm and Goblin Bombardment to disrupt opposing strategies. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd provide additional pump effects to boost the power of the creatures. The inclusion of cards like Blood Moon and Static Prison also adds disruption to slow down the opponent's game plan, allowing the deck to maintain pressure and win quickly.

This deck focuses on using a combination of creatures with graveyard recursion abilities and powerful instants/sorceries to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By constantly recurring creatures like Gravecrawler and Shambling Ghast, the deck can generate a lot of tokens and fuel cards like Malevolent Rumble and Phoenix Fleet Airship for devastating effects. Thoughtseize helps disrupt the opponent's strategy while cards like Chthonian Nightmare and Warren Soultrader provide additional control elements. The deck aims to create a strong board presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan to secure a quick victory.

The deck revolves around utilizing various creatures and spells to create a powerful combo that focuses on generating and manipulating +1/+1 counters to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Glaring Fleshraker, Basking Broodscale, and Malevolent Rumble in combination with Blade of the Bloodchief, players can quickly build up a formidable board presence. The deck also includes cards like Kozilek's Command and Sowing Mycospawn to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain control of the game. Ultimately, the goal is to assemble the combo pieces and dominate the battlefield with a relentless onslaught of powerful creatures.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts and using them to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By leveraging the affinity mechanic and cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble, the deck can generate a significant advantage in mana and card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Engineered Explosives and Tormod's Crypt allows the deck to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of efficient threats and versatile answers, this deck aims to apply pressure from multiple angles and close out games quickly.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and efficiently casting them to overwhelm the opponent with quick and powerful attacks. By combining cards like Mox Opal, Mishra's Bauble, and Urza's Saga with aggressive creatures like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary, the deck aims to swarm the battlefield and deal significant damage early on. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager provide additional value and flexibility in combat situations, while cards like Engineered Explosives and Claws of Gix offer removal options and control over the board. Overall, the deck seeks to maintain high tempo and pressure the opponent relentlessly.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble a powerful combo using creatures like Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker, along with cards like Blade of the Bloodchief and Malevolent Rumble to create a strong board presence and disrupt the opponent's board. The deck also includes powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End for additional threats. By utilizing cards like Urza's Saga and Ancient Stirrings to find key pieces of the combo, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through powerful synergies.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on using low-cost, efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls to provide additional support and resilience. With a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm, this deck aims to maintain board control while dealing consistent damage to the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Seasoned Pyromancer adds versatility and card advantage to ensure the deck can adapt to different situations.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Allosaurus Combo by utilizing cards such as Allosaurus Rider, Neoform, and Eldritch Evolution. It aims to find and play Allosaurus Rider as soon as possible, allowing it to be sacrificed to tutor for powerful creatures like Griselbrand or Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. The deck also includes protection in the form of Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer to ensure the combo goes off successfully. By efficiently tutoring for and playing key creatures, the deck can overwhelm opponents with its powerful threats.
